title: SQL: overflow values silently truncated to 0
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE rawtriples (id INTEGER NOT NULL, subjns INTEGER NOT NULL, subjlname TEXT NOT NULL, predns INTEGER NOT NULL, predlname TEXT NOT NULL, objns INTEGER NOT NULL, objlname TEXT NOT NULL, objlabelhash INTEGER, objlang TEXT, objlabel TEXT, objisliteral BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO rawtriples VALUES(1001, 1, '100168990', 2, 'glossaryEntry', 0, '', -5342185907394955428, NULL, 'adorning with mosaic', 1);
SELECT id, subjns, predns, objlabelhash, objisliteral FROM rawtriples WHERE objlabelhash IS NULL;
UPDATE rawtriples SET objlabelhash = -1 WHERE id = 1001;
key_bug_features: Overflow values truncated to zero during SQL insert
